# START nuxt-robots (indexable)
User-agent: *
Allow: /catalog
Allow: /en/catalog
Allow: /ru/catalog
Allow: /am/catalog
Disallow: /animeView
Disallow: /en/animeView
Disallow: /ru/animeView
Disallow: /am/animeView
Disallow: /error
Disallow: /en/error
Disallow: /ru/error
Disallow: /am/error
Disallow: /404
Disallow: /en/404
Disallow: /ru/404
Disallow: /am/404
Disallow: /doc
Disallow: /en/doc
Disallow: /ru/doc
Disallow: /am/doc

Sitemap: https://ota-ku.ru/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ota-ku.ru/sitemap_anime.xml
# END nuxt-robots
